D2 Vision L2 Understand Atom

Complementary Afterimages

slide the adapting colour, stare at the dot, then watch its opponent bloom on the white field

Colour is coded by opposed channels — red against green, blue against yellow. Adapt one pole and it tires, so a neutral field tilts toward the opposite pole.

Slide the adapting colour and stare at the black dot for several seconds, then jump your gaze to the white field. The right panel previews the complementary afterimage as it glows and fades.
